visa_types.overview:
Overview
This visa allows people to visit Japan for a holiday or recreation for a stay up to 90 days.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This visa allows people to visit Japan for a holiday or recreation for a stay up to 90 days.

## Visa Fees And Service Charges
You must pay the applicable Visa fee and Service fee when submitting your application. The Visa fees are determined based on your Nationality and Type of Entry to Japan. Please refer to the table given below to know your visa fees. (Effected date 2026/04/01) 
Visa Fees (General):

[jpn > npl > en > Table:Temporary Visitor Visa for Visiting relatives or acquaintances with Guarantor > Visa Fees And Service Charges 1]
Visa Fees ( For Indian):

[jpn > npl > en > Table:Temporary Visitor Visa for Visiting relatives or acquaintances with Guarantor > Visa Fees And Service Charges 2]

Please Note:
Service Charges: In addition to the standard visa fees, commissions will be charged by Japan Visa Application Centre based on the services provided.
The details are as follows.
Visa Fee is refunded only if the visa is not approved by the Embassy. Service/Courier Charge are inclusive of all taxes and non-refundable.
There is a service charge of NPR 2430 (inclusive of all taxes) levied per application over.
Service charge will be levied on applicants exempted from paying visa fees.
Applicants are required to prepay the VFS service fees online while booking their appointments via any bank card. However, Visa and value-added service fees will be collected at the time of application submission at VFS centre.
Optional Charges:
S.N. VAS PRICE in NPR
- Photocopy (per page) 5
- SMS service 250
- Form Filling Service 500
- Printing Service per page 15
- Out of Hours Passport Collection 800
- Get it Right 500
- Hold At Location -Inside Valley 800
- Hold At Location-Outside Valley 1500
- Premium Lounge 3500
- Visa At Your Doorstep (VAYD) 1 - 10 4500 per application
- Visa At Your Doorstep (VAYD) 10 and above 3000 per application
- Photograph (4 copies) - 200
- Prime Time with appointment - 4500
- Combo Service (includes Premium Lounge, Photograph, Printing, SMS, Hold At Location) - 4000

## Documents Required
 Document Checklist (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/7aZVOpWCGnYzhoMvpxSRm1/3f3b56a9df5c50222365c6e7535538dd/Visiting-Relatives-and-friends.pdf)
Note: Kindly arrange the documents in the same order as outlined in Document Checklist and attach a copy of it along with your visa application form.
Important-Please note all photocopies should be on A4 size only

## Photo Specifications
Applicant must present a colored photograph of 45 X 35 mm.
The photograph must show a person with neutral facial expression, open eyes and closed mouth.
In the photo the head of the person (from the tip of the chin to the scalp) must occupy about 2/3 of the photo, but should not be higher than 36 mm.
The head in the photo must be situated in the center of the photoghraph.
The distace between the eyes, (from the middle of the left eye to the middle of the right eye) must be at least 8mm, optimally 10 mm.
The photo must be made on high quality glossy and smooth paper without surface structure, with high printing quality.
The background must be light in colour or white, without any pattern and should have sufficient contrast of the face and hair.
Note: Please follow these instructions carefully. If the presented photos do not follow these requirements your application will be considered incomplete!

## Processing Time
It takes usually six (06) working days including the date of submission. Please make sure to apply in advance to avoid any inconvenience. In addition there are some cases which may take
                                                                        longer processing period depending on the individual circumstances.
Please Note:
Please note that this is an indicative processing time only. Processing time may increase or decrease at the discretion of the Embassy of Japan.
VFS Global is involved only in non-judgmental task of visa processing and does not play any role in processing the visa application as this is entirely the prerogative of the Embassy
                                                                        of Japan, Kathmandu.

## Download Forms
Please submit one completed and signed Visa Application form along with your application
 Visa Application Form (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/2MPdisVhcdyhVkQ5Av3Ugw/7f5078fdd87c0388c438a70ccaa0736c/Visa-Application-Form.pdf)
 List of visa applicants (PDF) (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/eB52uw86qb3kH69ZjGaFG/1b0471ad6cc18b65d575e72037da9cd6/list-of-visa-applicants.pdf)
 Details of Company / Organization (PDF) (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/fhFAyOeva1b8PKAFzOnZn/5ed33def858f51ef616827267346dafc/details-of-company-organization.pdf)
 Itinerary in Japan (PDF) (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/64BtIepvZSTWU2xxji51tS/457a54b430eb5b3f2ee643ed03444102/itinerary-in-japan.pdf)
 Invitation letter (PDF) (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/5eOhZl33gSfxUMwi0SOlTr/4269973d86b58681622f4620b310758a/invitation-letter.pdf)
 Sponser letter (PDF) (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/5d4c7U0mpcMDXmNpLm8bI8/41e3cc2e3becf6a1334f653e1eeb3d85/letter-of-guarantee.pdf)

Kindly refer https://www.mofa.go.jp/j_info/visit/visa/short/other_visa.html (https://www.mofa.go.jp/j_info/visit/visa/short/other_visa.html)                                                                        website for further details.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
A stay during which the applicant performs remunerative work (professor, journalist, researcher, engineer etc.) in Japan or a stay of over 90 days (student, trainee, etc.) in Japan. Please
                                                                        click here (http://www.mofa.go.jp/j_info/visit/visa/long/index.html) for more details.
The certificate of eligibility (http://www.immi-moj.go.jp/english/tetuduki/kanri/shyorui/01.html) issued by the Immigration Bureau of Japan
                                                                        must be submitted to apply this category.
- Procedures chart for work or long-term stay (http://www.mofa.go.jp/j_info/visit/visa/process/long.html)
- Persons who leave japan and wish to re-enter japan (http://www.mofa.go.jp/ca/fna/page22e_000694.html)
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
A stay during which the applicant performs remunerative work (professor, journalist, researcher, engineer etc.) in Japan or a stay of over 90 days (student, trainee, etc.) in Japan. Please

The certificate of eligibility (http://www.immi-moj.go.jp/english/tetuduki/kanri/shyorui/01.html) issued by the Immigration Bureau of Japan
                                                                        must be submitted to apply this category.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
This visa allows business people to make multiple short business visit to Japan for up to 90 days during your visa validity period. Business activities may include a conference, negotiation
                                                                        or exploratory business visit.
visa_types.full_text:

## Documents Required
 Document Checklist (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/sATnlypYvE5TV9Y6RqgvE/f3e58e11855d0fc8ca7a21d117020bfc/Short-Term-Business-Affairs.pdf)
Note: Kindly arrange the documents in the same order as outlined in Document Checklist and attach a copy of it along with your visa application form.
Important-Please note all photocopies should be on A4 size only

## Photo Specifications
Applicant must present a colored photograph of 45 X 35 mm.
The photograph must show a person with neutral facial expression, open eyes and closed mouth.
In the photo the head of the person (from the tip of the chin to the scalp) must occupy about 2/3 of the photo, but should not be higher than 36 mm.
The head in the photo must be situated in the center of the photoghraph.
The distace between the eyes, (from the middle of the left eye to the middle of the right eye) must be at least 8mm, optimally 10 mm.
The photo must be made on high quality glossy and smooth paper without surface structure, with high printing quality.
The background must be light in colour or white, without any pattern and should have sufficient contrast of the face and hair.
Note: Please follow these instructions carefully. If the presented photos do not follow these requirements your application will be considered incomplete!

## Processing Time
It takes usually six (06) working days including the date of submission. Please make sure to apply in advance to avoid any inconvenience. In addition there are some cases which may take
                                                                        longer processing period depending on the individual circumstances.
Please Note:
Please note that this is an indicative processing time only. Processing time may increase or decrease at the discretion of the Embassy of Japan.
VFS Global is involved only in non-judgmental task of visa processing and does not play any role in processing the visa application as this is entirely the prerogative of the Embassy
                                                                        of Japan, Kathmandu.
